---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for NoviSpace
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other apps?

## Implementation Notes (Optional)
Any technical details or suggestions for implementation?
